description:
Goal
Move separately compiled units, linked-program preparation, and linker seams onto the new stage-specific data types so pipeline state reads as unit graph -> linked program rather than ad hoc modules.

Signal
- `CompiledUnit`, pipeline outputs, and linker seams use explicit stage types.
- The linked whole-program IR is represented distinctly from separately compiled units.
- World no longer needs to explain unit-vs-linked semantics via comments alone.
title: Data model: migrate pipeline and linker onto stage types
